rulings.Case Title: 2331-2333-2335 JONES STREET HOA VS. KEITH GORLEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renotice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 1. Petitioner's Motion to Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party prepare order and judgment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID SALMA et al VS. RUBEN DIEGO Q PICARDO et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Quashing Three Subpoenas
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 2. Defendant's Motion for Order Quashing Three Subpoenas DENIED. Parties to present stipulated protective order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE MICHAEL SHUEY VS. KARIN L ANDERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Successor Trustee For Deceased Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 3. Plaintiff's Motion to Substitute Successor Trustee Continued to September 21, 2015 to be heard with other pending motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 4. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint Continued to October 9, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint and reply to department 501 no later than September 18, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KURT LESSWING VS. COURTNEY SEASHOLS **(regular civil case)**
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 5. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach Proof of Service for both notices forming the basis of this unlawful detainer action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 925 PIERCE I1, LLC VS. MACIE LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Against Plaintiff 925 Pierce I1, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 9. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOCYE TRAN VS. KRISIN M. MARTILLA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 11. Defendant's Motion to Compel Deposition and Further Responses to Interrogatories OFF CALENDAR moot. Stipulation resolving discovery issues filed on September 4, 2015. Trial is continued to September 21, 2015 and settlement conference is set on September 16, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET PILLOW ET AL VS. MICHAEL KRAEMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 6. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that compliance with CCP 827, CC 1947.3 and Regulation 12. 20 is a required element of the unlawful detainer cause of action under the circumstances of this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LSL PROPERTIES B14 DE. LLC VS. JAMES LASKIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Petition For Relief From Forfeiture
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 7. Defendant's Motion for Relief from Forfeiture Continued to September 14, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LSL PROPERTIES B14 DE. LLC VS. JAMES LASKIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 7. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment Continued to September 14, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL K. SAM VS. LOUIS C. GUILLORY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ; Declaration; Pos
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 12. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide the courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 501 at least three days before the hearing. The motion was filed on September 4, 2015. Courtesy copies delivered to department 501 at 1:40 p.m. on September 8, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES W. HURLEY VS. NICOLA CHIPPS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 8. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 9, 2015, line 10. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete responses without objections to Special Interrogatories and Request for Production by personal service within 3 days of Notice of Entry of order. Trial is continued to September 28, 2015. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,151.50. = (501/REQ)
